calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"wc -l AGENTS.md .github/prompts/predict.md schemas/prediction.schema.json schemas/agent_flags.schema.json schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && sed -n '1,300p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73279035 --event evt-petition-disposition && find data/cases/scotus/73279035 -maxdepth 6 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(JSON.stringify(r))

const results = await Promise.all([
  tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73279035 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":10000}),
  tools.exec_command({cmd:"find data/cases/scotus/73279035 -maxdepth 8 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000})
]); results.forEa

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73279035/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,360p' data/cases/scotus/73279035/record/snapshots/2026-07-16.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73279035/record/documents/documents.json && wc -l -c data/cases/scotus/73279035/record/documents/*.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,120p' data/cases/scotus/73279035/record/documents/questions-presented.txt && rg -n \"^(QUESTIONS? PRESENTED|INTRODUCTION|STATEMENT|REASONS? FOR|ARGUMENT|CONCLUSION|TABLE OF CONTENTS|I\\.|II\\.|III\\.|A\\.|B\\.|C\\.)\" data/cases/scotus/73279035/record/documents/petition.txt data/cases/scotus/73279035/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt | head -240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_token

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '413,900p' data/cases/scotus/73279035/record/documents/petition.txt && sed -n '901,1300p' data/cases/scotus/73279035/record/documents/petition.txt && sed -n '1301,1645p' data/cases/scotus/73279035/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '230,1325p' data/cases/scotus/73279035/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73279035/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert|CVSG|salience band|Term 2025|2025 Term|originating circuit|Sixth|relist\" metrics/statpack.md | head -160","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,180p' metrics/statpack.md && sed -n '180,380p' metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.. | objects | select(has(\"term\") and (.term == \"2025\" or .term == 2025))' metrics/statpack.json | head -240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"fedcourts query|open-events|--era|--decided-before\" docs/cli.md | head -100 && sed -n '1,220p' docs/cli.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --citation 'CIGNA Corp. v. Amara' --citation 'Mertens v. Hewitt Associates' --limit 10 --corpus-backend ranged","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(JSON.stringify(r))
const hits = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|search opinions|docket/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(hits);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"equitable surcharge\" AND \"1132(a)(3)\"",filed_after:"2023-01-01",fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","court","absolute_url","snippet"],num_results:10,order_by:"score desc"}); text(r);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",case_name:"Aramark Services v. Aetna Life Insurance",fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","court","absolute_url","docketNumber","cluster_id","status"],num_results:10,order_by:"dateFiled desc"}); text(r);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"Aramark Aetna surcharge",fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","court","absolute_url","docketNumber","cluster_id","status"],num_results:10,order_by:"dateFiled desc"}); text(r);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"clusters",item_id:10761003,fields:["id","case_name","date_filed","precedential_status","citations","docket","sub_opinions"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) c.type==="image"?image(c):text(c.text||c);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"opinions",item_id:11227588,fields:["id","type","author_str","html_with_citations"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) c.type==="image"?image(c):text(c.text||c);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"dockets",item_id:69183199,fields:["id","docket_number","case_name","date_last_filing","date_terminated","appeal_from","court","absolute_url"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) c.type==="image"?image(c):text(c.text||c);
const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_schema({endpoint_id:"docket-entries"}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) c.type==="image"?image(c):text(c.text||c);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__call_endpoint({endpoint_id:"docket-entries",query:{docket:69183199,order_by:"-date_filed",fields:["date_filed","entry_number","description"]},num_results:10}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) c.type==="image"?image(c):text(c.text||c);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"Stark Reliance surcharge 502(a)(3)",fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","court","absolute_url","docketNumber","cluster_id","status"],num_results:10,order_by:"dateFiled desc"}); text(r);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"clusters",item_id:10624483,fields:["id","case_name","date_filed","citations","sub_opinions"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) c.type==="image"?image(c):text(c.text||c);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"opinions",item_id:11091071,fields:["id","html_with_citations"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) c.type==="image"?image(c):text(c.text||c);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ && git status --short -- data/cases/scotus/73279035/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260716T073449Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"mkdir -p data/cases/scotus/73279035/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260716T073449Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)

const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai/data/cases/scotus/73279035/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260716T073449Z/prediction.json
+{
+  "schema_version": "1.0",
+  "case_id": "scotus/73279035",
+  "event_id": "evt-petition-disposition",
+  "predictor_id": "codex-baseline",
+  "engine": "codex",
+  "model": "gpt-5.6-sol",
+  "run_id": "20260716T073449Z",
+  "created_at": "2026-07-1

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find data/cases/scotus/73279035/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260716T073449Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort && jq empty data/cases/scotus/73279035/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260716T073449Z/*.json && git diff --check && git status --short","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(JSON.stringify(r))

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(JSON.stringify(r))
